{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Cloudseeker Hydras
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Cloudseeker Hydras]] are three winged lizard-like creatures.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
